title: Salty Irish Tortilla Wrap
description: A dense and comforting dish featuring tortillas, pickled vegetables, and a touch of saltiness, perfect for breakfast or as an appetizer.

ingredients.name: 2 large tortilla wraps
ingredients.notes: Make sure they are gluten-free if necessary.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup pickled vegetables (such as gherkins or dill pickles, drained)
Optional: Fresh herbs like parsley or chives

instructions: Place the tortilla wraps on a baking sheet.
Sprinkle the salt evenly over each wrap, making sure it’s distributed well but not overwhelming.
If using fresh herbs, chop them finely and sprinkle lightly over the top of the salted tortillas for added freshness.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 5-7 minutes or until the wraps are crispy and golden.
Let cool slightly before wrapping pickled vegetables inside each wrap. Serve immediately.
